name: Update

unions.name: Update
unions.comment:
Alternative type for update function.

    update : msg -> Update model msg

values.name: batch
values.type: List.List (Update.Update model msg) -> Update.Update model msg

values.name: child
values.comment:
Lift `Update` for a child model to one for the parent model.

e.g.,

    type alias Model =
        { child1 : ChildModel
        }

    type alias ChildModel =
        { foo : String
        }

    child1Update : Update ChildModel msg
    child1Update =
        Debug.todo "Update for the `ChildModel`"

    update : Update Model msg
    update =
        child
            .child1
            (\c model -> { model | child1 = c })
            child1Update
values.type: (b -> a) -> (a -> b -> b) -> Update.Update a msg -> Update.Update b msg

values.name: map
values.type: (a -> b) -> Update.Update model a -> Update.Update model b

values.name: maybeChild
values.comment:
Same as `child` but do nothing if first argument becomes to `Nothing`.
It is usefull for handling page updates of SPA.

e.g.,

    type alias Model =
        { page : Page
        }

    type Page
        = Page1 Page1Model
        | Page2 Page2Model

    type alias Page1Model =
        { foo : String
        }

    type alias Page2Model =
        { bar : Int
        }

    page1Update : Update Page1Model msg
    page1Update =
        Debug.todo "update function for `Page1`."

    update : Update Model msg
    update =
        Update.with identity
            [ \{ page } ->
                case page of
                    Page1 page1 ->
                        page1Update
                            (\model ->
                                case model.page of
                                    Page1 a ->
                                        Just a

                                    _ ->
                                        Nothing
                            )
                            (\p model ->
                                case model.page of
                                    Page1 _ ->
                                        { model | page = Page1 p }

                                    _ ->
                                        model
                            )
                            page1Update

                    _ ->
                        Debug.todo ""
            ]
values.type: (b -> Maybe.Maybe a) -> (a -> b -> b) -> Update.Update a msg -> Update.Update b msg

values.name: modify
values.type: (model -> model) -> Update.Update model msg

values.name: none
values.type: Update.Update model msg

values.name: on
values.comment: Evaluate `Update` only if it matches the case.
values.type: (a -> Basics.Bool) -> List.List (Update.Update model msg) -> a -> Update.Update model msg

values.name: onErr
values.comment: Evaluate `Update` only if the case is `Err`.
values.type: List.List (err -> Update.Update model msg) -> Result.Result err a -> Update.Update model msg

values.name: onJust
values.comment: Evaluate `Update` only if the case is `Just`.
values.type: List.List (a -> Update.Update model msg) -> Maybe.Maybe a -> Update.Update model msg

values.name: onNothing
values.comment: Evaluate `Update` only if the case is `Nothing`.
values.type: List.List (Update.Update model msg) -> Maybe.Maybe a -> Update.Update model msg

values.name: onOk
values.comment: Evaluate `Update` only if the case is `Ok`.
values.type: List.List (a -> Update.Update model msg) -> Result.Result err a -> Update.Update model msg

values.name: push
values.type: (model -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg) -> Update.Update model msg

values.name: run
values.comment:
Evaluate to a model-cmd pair.

It is for converting to the normal update function.
e.g.,

    main : Program flags model msg
    main =
        element
            { init = init
            , view = view
            , update = Update.run << update
            , subscriptions = subscriptions
            }

    update : msg -> Update model msg
    update =
        ...
values.type: Update.Update model msg -> model -> ( model, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: unless
values.comment: Evaluate `Update` unless it meets the condition.
values.type: Basics.Bool -> List.List (Update.Update model msg) -> Update.Update model msg

values.name: when
values.comment: Evaluate `Update` only if it meets the condition.
values.type: Basics.Bool -> List.List (Update.Update model msg) -> Update.Update model msg

values.name: whenErr
values.comment: Evaluate `Update` only if the first argument value is `Err`.
values.type: Result.Result err a -> List.List (err -> Update.Update model msg) -> Update.Update model msg

values.name: whenJust
values.comment: Evaluate `Update` only if the first argument value is `Just`.
values.type: Maybe.Maybe a -> List.List (a -> Update.Update model msg) -> Update.Update model msg

values.name: whenNothing
values.comment: Evaluate `Update` only if the first argument value is `Nothing`.
values.type: Maybe.Maybe a -> List.List (Update.Update model msg) -> Update.Update model msg

values.name: whenOk
values.comment: Evaluate `Update` only if the first argument value is `Ok`.
values.type: Result.Result err a -> List.List (a -> Update.Update model msg) -> Update.Update model msg

values.name: with
values.type: (model -> a) -> List.List (a -> Update.Update model msg) -> Update.Update model msg
